ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the client */,
  "client_address" TEXT /* Client address */,
  "client_city" TEXT /* Client city */,
  "client_state" TEXT /* Client state */,
  "client_zip" TEXT /* Client zip */,
  "client_country" TEXT /* Client country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy meter */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the meter belongs to */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of energy meter (e.g., smart meter, analog meter) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the energy meter */,
  "meter_installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the meter was installed */,
  "meter_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the meter was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_meters_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "sensor_installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "watts" REAL /* Energy consumption in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage in volts */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power factor */,
  "energy_consumption_type" TEXT /* Type of energy consumption (e.g., active, reactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meter_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., energy usage, power quality, sensor malfunction) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Custom message for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., energy usage, power quality) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was initiated */,
  "collaboration_message" TEXT /* Message for the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
